commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `mode === "oneshot"` skip to ACP startup identity reconciliation and a manager regression test asserting no runtime ensure/status calls for those records.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +40. Total +43 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a persisted one-shot ACP record with `identity.state: "pending"` and a stable ACP session id reaches the current startup reconcile `checked` path and can trigger the gateway warning if runtime reconciliation fails.
commands.review_followup: Human proof gate: no narrow code repair is needed, but this external PR should wait for real runtime evidence or maintainer override because the submitted proof is only a mocked unit test.

target.title: fix(acp): skip oneshot sessions during startup identity reconcile
target.body:
## Summary

Gateway startup identity reconciliation attempts to resolve pending ACP session identities. Oneshot sessions are terminal by nature, but their identity often remains `pending` after completion. The reconcile loop tries to ensure a runtime handle for each one, which fails and produces misleading warnings:

```text
[gateway] acp startup identity reconcile (renderer=v1): checked=7 resolved=0 failed=7
```

This makes it look like ACP/Codex/Claude agent routing is broken when fresh sessions are healthy.

## Fix

Skip sessions with `mode === "oneshot"` in `reconcilePendingSessionIdentities` so the startup scan only processes persistent sessions that may genuinely need identity resolution.

## Verification

```
Behavior addressed: Gateway startup reconcile warning on terminal oneshot sessions
Real environment tested: macOS arm64, Node 22, local dev
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm test src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts
Evidence after fix: 86 tests pass (85 existing + 1 new)
Observed result after fix: New test confirms oneshot sessions are skipped (checked=0, resolved=0, failed=0), no ensureSession or getStatus calls made
What was not tested: Live gateway restart with stale oneshot sessions (requires persisted ACP state)
```

Closes #72013
target.author: sebtardif
